---
title: "Wave-Based Acoustics Simulations"
subtitle: "Auditory and tactile interactions, ??/??/2026"
author: Joy Spuri Forotti, 157208@spes.uniud.it
output: 
  beamer_presentation:
    includes:
      in_header: style.tex
header-includes:
- \titlegraphic{\includegraphics[width=5cm]{media/logo_uniud.jpg}}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(kableExtra)
```

## TODO

`TODO`
